IXHVEngine

The IXHVEngine interface supports the following methods.

Method Description
CreateLocalTalker Creates a local talker.
DoWork Drives the data pump for the XHV library.
EnableProcessingMode Determines which processing modes will be usable by the XHV engine and by the local talkers registered with the engine.
GetCallbackInterface Detrmines the ITitleXHV that is being used as the callback interface.
GetLocalTalkerStatus Determines the status of the specified local talker.
GetProcessingMode Determines the processing mode for the specified local talker.
GetRemoteTalkers Copies the currently known list of remote talkers from the engine.
IsTalking Determines whether voice data is currently being received by a specified remote talker.
RegisterLocalTalker Registers the specified local talker.
RegisterRemoteTalker Registers the specified remote talker.
RegisterSpeechRecognitionBank Registers the specified speech recognition bank.
SelectVocabulary Selects which speech recognition vocabularies are active for the specified local talker.
SetCallbackInterface Sets the ITitleXHV to use as the callback interface.
SetMaxPlaybackStreamsCount Sets the maximum number of playback streams available for playing decoded voice data.
SetMixBinMapping Sets the mixbins to use when sending voice data from a specified source remote talker to a specified destination (local talker or speaker output).
SetMixBinVolumes Sets the mix bin volumes to use for the specified remote talker.
SetPlaybackPriority Sets the destination priority of voice data from a specified remote talker.
SetProcessingMode Sets the local talker to a specific processing mode.
SetVoiceMask Sets the input voice mask parameters for the specified local talker.
SubmitIncomingVoicePacket Reports that a voice packet has been received from the network.
UnregisterLocalTalker Unregisters a local talker previously registered with RegisterLocalTalker.
UnregisterRemoteTalker Unregisters a remote talker previously registered with RegisterRemoteTalker.
VoiceMailPlay Starts playback of the voice message for the local talker.
VoiceMailRecord Starts the recording for the local talker.
VoiceMailStop Stops the current voice message operation on the local talker.

The IXHVEngine interface also supports the AddRef and Release methods. The QueryInterface method is not supported on Xbox.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xhv.h.

Import Library: Use Xvoice.lib.
